name: Cloak of Bloody Surprises
description: Notes The Cloak of Bloody Surprises is an incredibly rare ability with a tremendous offensive focus. It provides a massive +30 ATT boost upon uncloaking, with 150 flat damage from lethal strike.
effects: Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Effect on Self: SPD Decrease (-40 SPD) for 3 seconds, ATT Boost (+30 ATT) for 3 seconds Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 150 (+0 per ATT > 55) and 35% (+2% per ATT > 55) of target’s defense as additional damage for 3 seconds
